summary: Successfully refactored decompose.py with batched extraction and fail-fast verification. Implementation includes: (1) batched extraction processing 7 skills at a time with inline verification using rapidfuzz, (2) fail-fast behavior that stops immediately on verification failure and writes FAILED.md, (3) new --no-fail-fast flag for edge cases, (4) enhanced prompts with character-for-character copying instructions. Testing confirmed verification logic works correctly - valid extractions pass, corrupted text fails as expected.
test_results: Verification logic tested with 5 test cases - all passed. Valid 'our_take' fields verify successfully (similarity >= 0.95), corrupted text fails verification as intended. CLI help works correctly. --no-fail-fast flag implemented and available.
learnings: rapidfuzz.fuzz.partial_ratio with 0.95 threshold provides robust fuzzy verification for extracted text
Batched extraction with batch_size=7 balances context load vs API efficiency
sys.exit(1) in fail-fast mode ensures clean termination with error code for downstream automation
Character-for-character copying instructions in prompts critical for verification reliability
